name: HR Line Agent Bot (State Machine + NLP)

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  e.id as employee_id, 
  e.employee_code, 
  e.name, 
  e.position, 
  e.department, 
  e.role, 
  e.job_description,
  e.total_sick_leave, e.used_sick_leave,
  e.total_annual_leave, e.used_annual_leave,
  e.total_personal_leave, e.used_personal_leave,
  s.current_state,
  s.temp_data
FROM (SELECT $1::text as line_id) input
LEFT JOIN employees e ON e.line_user_id = input.line_id
LEFT JOIN user_sessions s ON s.line_user_id = input.line_id;

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "qwen2.5:7b",
  "prompt": "You are an HR Assistant Bot. Parse the user's Thai message and extract structured fields in JSON format.
Current date today is: {{ new Date(new Date().getTime() + 7 * 3600 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0] }} (Bangkok Time).

Analyze the input text and output a JSON object with these EXACT keys:
{
  "intent": "request_leave" | "check_leave" | "check_jd" | "switch_user" | "general_chat",
  "leave_type": "sick" | "annual" | "personal" | null,
  "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD" | null,
  "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD" | null,
  "days": number | null,
  "reason": "Thai string" | null,
  "employee_code": "EMPxxx" | null
}

Guidelines:
1. Intent:
   - "request_leave": User wants to request leave (e.g., "ขอลา", "ป่วย", "ลากิจ", "พักร้อน").
   - "check_leave": User wants to check remaining leave days (e.g., "วันลาคงเหลือ", "สิทธิ์วันหยุด").
   - "check_jd": User wants to check job description (e.g., "งานของฉัน", "job description").
   - "switch_user": User wants to switch account (e.g., "/switch EMP001", "สลับผู้ใช้เป็น EMP002").
   - "general_chat": Any other text.
2. Relative Dates parsing (relative to today):
   - "วันนี้" -> today
   - "พรุ่งนี้" -> tomorrow
   - "วันจันทร์อาทิตย์หน้า" -> next Monday
   - "อีก 3 วันถัดไป" starting tomorrow -> start_date: tomorrow, end_date: 2 days after tomorrow, days: 3
3. Output ONLY raw JSON. No markdown, no formatting, no extra text.

User text: "{{ ($('Parse LINE Event').first().json.messageText || '').replace(/\/g, '\\').replace(/"/g, '\"') }}"
JSON Output:",
  "stream": false,
  "options": {
    "temperature": 0.1
  }
}
